title: init_db() runs on every request via before_request
evidence: app.py:47-50 @app.before_request calls init_db(), which opens a fresh sqlite3 connection and runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on every request
suggestion: Call init_db() once at startup instead of per-request to avoid repeated connect + DDL overhead

title: PUT only validates year type when the value changes
evidence: app.py:189 `if year is not None and year != row["year"]` skips int-coercion when the submitted year equals the stored value, so a non-int equal-by-value payload path is inconsistent with POST
suggestion: Validate/coerce year on any provided value regardless of prior value

title: ISBN uniqueness enforced with 409 (beyond spec)
evidence: app.py:39 `isbn TEXT UNIQUE` + app.py:101-102/201-202 return 409 on sqlite3.IntegrityError
suggestion: None — reasonable enhancement; not required by TASK.md

title: Very low token efficiency for a repair task
evidence: scores.json token_efficiency=0.0135; .hermes_usage.json total_tokens=430943 (376832 cache-read) across 15 api_calls to complete a small 2-file fix
